placeholder.description: This settings screen is coming soon. More options will be available shortly.

productUpdates.title: Receive product updates
productUpdates.description: Be the first to know about new features and improvements.

pendingTaskEmail.title: Email me when my pending tasks start
pendingTaskEmail.description: We'll notify you by email when a task begins.

marketingAds.title: Ads about Devely
marketingAds.description: I agree to the collection and sharing of data for marketing purposes.

help.title: Help center
help.description: Learn how to use Devely and find answers to common questions.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.description: Enter a prompt on the home page to create your first project.

projects.title: Project management
projects.description: View, edit, and track deployment status from the projects page.

github.title: GitHub integration
github.description: Grant GitHub App permissions to connect repositories and sync code.

account.title: Account & settings
account.description: Update your profile, language, theme, and other account preferences.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.empty: No results found. Try a different keyword.

createProject.question: How do I create a project?
createProject.answer: Describe the website you want on the home page, or start from a template to create a new project.

githubPermission.question: Why can't I see my GitHub repositories?
githubPermission.answer: You need to install the GitHub App and grant repository access. Follow the prompts, then refresh the list.

agentChat.question: What happens when I chat with the agent?
agentChat.answer: The agent can update code, layout, and content automatically. Review changes in the project code tab.

credits.question: How are credits used?
credits.answer: Credits are consumed by agent tasks and generation requests. Check usage in Settings > Account. A daily amount refreshes each day.

restoreTrash.question: Can I restore deleted conversations?
restoreTrash.answer: Yes. Open Trash to review deleted agent conversations and restore them.

changeLanguage.question: Where can I change the language?
changeLanguage.answer: Go to Settings > General > Language and choose Korean, English, or Japanese.

contact.title: Still need help?
contact.description: Send us a message and our team will get back to you.
